original: The slick new uniform your Dad issued a while back. Armored, form-fitting, and utilitarian. Doesn’t provide as much protection as proper armor (or modesty, for that matter), but it’s got a built-in shield emitter to boost your shields and is hardened against corrosives. Note that it isn’t strong enough to generate a defensive shield on its own.
